calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-16-2018 Vacated

Petition To Surcharge Trustee For Failure To Distribute Trust Property, For Constructive Trust, And For Accounting
Off Calendar Jan-23-2018 Continued To Mar-19-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: John Minton for Nancy Avishar (Petitioner).
Robert Cross for and with Robin Levitt (Respondent).

Counsel spoke of the length of trial, number of witnesses, etc. The Petition to Surcharge Trustee for Failure to Distribute Trust Property, etc. is set for trial in the Department of the Presiding Judge (206) on March 19, 2018 at 9:30 a.m., (order for the same signed in open court/a copy of the order and notice of trial was provided to Counsel). The Parties are to attend a settlement conference with the Pang Ly Commissioner Pro Tem on February 15, 2018 at 9:30 a.m., in Dept. 603.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

Petition To Surcharge Trustee For Failure To Distribute Trust Property, For Constructive Trust, And For Accounting
Off Calendar Nov-14-2017 Continued To Jan-23-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: John Minton for Nancy Avishar (Petitioner).
Robert Cross for Robin Levitt (Respondent).

Mr. Minton stated that he does not know if pro bono mediation would be helpful, that the principal amount is less than $150,000.00, that he sent a letter a week ago, that he thinks they can get it done and if not, he would like to get an evidentiary hearing scheduled. Mr. Cross stated that they have agreed to talk, that little discovery has been done, that if it doesn't settle, they would still have to do discovery (document production/depositions of parties out of this jurisdiction/experts), and that the matter is not ready to set for trial. Mr. Minton thinks the trial will be two half days and Mr. Cross thinks it will be two full days. The Petition to Surcharge Trustee, etc. is continued to January 23, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for a final prehearing conference with the expectation that either the case settled or the parties have instituted all discovery they needed to do.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

Petition To Surcharge Trustee For Failure To Distribute Trust Property, For Constructive Trust, And For Accounting
Off Calendar Aug-15-2017 Continued To Nov-14-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: John Minton appeared by telephone for Nancy Avishar (Petitioner).
Robert Cross for Robin Levitt (Respondent).

Counsel agree to a 90-day continuance and reported that discovery is still outstanding. The Petition to Surcharge Current Trustee for Failure to Distribute Trust Property, etc. is continued to November 14, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 with the expectation that the parties will do discovery and meet and confer regarding how the matter will proceed. The Court informed Counsel that it would be helpful for them to provide a joint status statement by November 7, 2017.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.
